packageRules.description: Subrepo .gitrepo bumps cannot auto-merge until subrepo-pull.yaml uses a token that re-triggers checks. See issue #23. Narrowed to external/**/.gitrepo so unrelated custom-regex managers (Lego, bindreams/hole) can auto-merge.

external/** is a vendored git-subrepo. Disable all package updates inside this tree so Renovate doesn't edit inner files -- such edits would conflict with the next `git subrepo pull` from upstream and require manual resolution. Routine bumps must come via the .gitrepo customManager (re-enabled by the next rule). Vulnerability advisories still flow because Renovate's vulnerabilityAlerts pipeline force-sets `enabled: true` for matching deps, regardless of packageRules. See issue #82.
Re-enable the .gitrepo subrepo customManager that the broad external/** disable above would otherwise silence. Subrepo bumps are how external/** legitimately advances.

libdns ecosystem moves in lockstep -- group core + subdrivers so a single PR bumps them together. Otherwise per-subdriver PRs can straddle libdns major versions and break the Go build (see issue #81).
Filter bindreams/hole tags to the v2ray-plugin track only and strip the per-track prefix. Renovate disallows extractVersion on custom managers, so it lives here.
Filter bindreams/hole tags to the galoshes track only and strip the per-track prefix.

customManagers.description: Tag-pinned git-subrepos (e.g. shadowsocks-rust at v1.24.0). Renovate bumps 'branch = vX.Y.Z' to the newest upstream release; .github/workflows/subrepo-pull.yaml completes the pull.
Lego ACME client baked into the provisioner image via `go install`. `go install ...@vX.Y.Z` is not picked up by default Renovate Go-module rules.

v2ray-plugin from bindreams/hole. Tags follow `releases/v2ray-plugin/v<X.Y.Z[-hole.N]>`. depNameTemplate carries a track-unique logical name so the matchDepNames packageRule (above) can apply extractVersion to filter to this track only and strip the prefix. packageNameTemplate is the real GitHub repo Renovate queries.
galoshes from bindreams/hole. Same dual-name pattern as the v2ray-plugin manager above.
